name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and foldable design for travel.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall insulated 750ml water bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX Blue switches, per-key lighting, and detachable USB-C cable.

name: Leather Minimalist Wallet
description: Slim genuine leather wallet with 6 card slots, RFID blocking, and a cash compartment. Available in black and tan.

name: Portable Espresso Maker
description: Hand-powered portable espresso machine compatible with ground coffee and Nespresso pods. No electricity needed.

name: Yoga Mat Pro
description: 6mm thick non-slip TPE yoga mat with alignment lines, carrying strap, and moisture-resistant surface. 183cm x 61cm.

name: Ceramic Pour-Over Coffee Set
description: Handcrafted ceramic dripper with glass carafe and reusable stainless steel filter. Brews up to 600ml.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: 15W Qi-certified wireless charger compatible with iPhone and Android. LED indicator, anti-slip base, 1m cable included.

name: Hardcover Dotted Journal
description: 200-page A5 dotted notebook with lay-flat binding, ribbon bookmark, and thick 120gsm paper. Acid-free.

name: Bamboo Desk Organizer
description: 5-compartment bamboo desktop organizer for pens, scissors, phone, and stationery. Natural finish, eco-friendly material.
